mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, keyword FROM keyword_subscription WHERE UPPER(target_type) = 'POST' AND ( #{title} LIKE CONCAT('%', keyword, '%') OR #{content} LIKE CONCAT('%', keyword, '%') )

SELECT user_id as userId, keyword FROM keyword_subscription WHERE UPPER(target_type) = 'REVIEW' AND ( #{title} LIKE CONCAT('%', keyword, '%') OR #{content} LIKE CONCAT('%', keyword, '%') OR #{address} LIKE CONCAT('%', keyword, '%') OR #{pros} LIKE CONCAT('%', keyword, '%') OR #{cons} LIKE CONCAT('%', keyword, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO keyword_alarm (user_id, target_type, target_id, message, is_read) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{message}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM keyword_alarm WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 'N'

SELECT id, user_id as userId, target_type as targetType, target_id as targetId, message, is_read as isRead, created_at as createdAt FROM keyword_alarm WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
